title: Travel Mug with Handle and Lid Hot & Cold Drinks Coffee Cup 400ml Leakproof Vacuum Flask Thermal Insulated Mugs Perfect for Gym Home Travel School & Office
features: ☕ Leakproof & Spill-Proof Design: Enjoy your hot or cold drinks worry free! This travel mug comes with a secure, leakproof lid that prevents spills, making it perfect for commuting, hiking, or office use without messy surprises.

🌡️ Superior Temperature Retention: Keeps beverages hot for up to 6 hours or cold for 8! Thanks to double wall vacuum insulation, your coffee stays piping hot or icy cold longer ideal for busy days at school, work, or on the go.

🧳 Travel-Friendly & Compact: At 450ml, this thermal mug fits perfectly in backpacks, car cup holders, and travel bags. The comfortable handle makes it easy to carry on daily commutes, outdoor adventures, or while running errands.

🔒 Durable & Safe Materials: Made from premium stainless steel it’s BPA-free, rust-resistant, and built to last. The interior keeps flavors pure no lingering odors or metallic taste just fresh coffee, tea, or juice every time!

🏢 Stylish & Multi Purpose: Sleek and modern design suits any setting School, office, gym, or home. Whether you prefer coffee, tea, or smoothies, this insulated mug is your go-to companion for all-day hydration in style!
description: The Simple Modern coffee mug with elevated features. It's designed with spill proof lid. and double-wall insulation design slows down heat transfer. The convenient push-button lid is drinkable from any angle and is leak-proof in the closed position allowing for safe transport and easy sipping. Like all Simple Modern Coffee Mug products is made from premium grade materials and is designed to last. The material that preserves the integrity of your coffee's flavor for even the most discerning palates and the double walled insulation ensures your coffee stays hot or cold for hours. The silicone base softens Handel adds grip to enhance stability in hand, and its narrow design makes it car cupholder friendly and perfect for on-the-go hydration.The Coffee Mugs are top rack dishwasher safe. Not only is it perfect for daily use, work and travel drinking but also a dishwasher safe and easy to clean in yours kitchen sink. With durability like this, you’ll be refilling your coffee mug every day.
